_comment: Kernel-owned safety data: the never-route-off-Anthropic path globs the workflow kernel needs for sensitive-path routing overrides. The kernel ships this copy so an installed runtime (~/.claude or ~/.codex plugin cache) never resolves files from a depot repository checkout. Source of truth for orchestrator routing remains plugins/pipeline/references/routing-policy.json (security.neverRouteOffAnthropic.pathGlobs); tests/test_workflow_classes.py asserts the two lists stay identical. Callers may still pass an explicit routing_policy_path to WorkflowTemplates.
